\documentclass[11pt,a4paper]{article}
\usepackage[margin=2cm]{geometry}
\usepackage{setspace}
\usepackage{fontspec}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{booktabs}
\usepackage{array}
\usepackage{graphicx}
\usepackage{float}
\usepackage{caption}

\setmainfont{Times New Roman}
\singlespacing

% Reduce spacing
\setlength{\parskip}{0.3em}
\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}

% Compact heading spacing and sizing
\usepackage{titlesec}
\titleformat*{\section}{\normalsize\bfseries}
\titleformat*{\subsection}{\normalsize\bfseries}
\titlespacing*{\section}{0pt}{0.4em}{0.2em}
\titlespacing*{\subsection}{0pt}{0.3em}{0.15em}

% Fix for tightlist
\providecommand{\tightlist}{%
  \setlength{\itemsep}{0pt}\setlength{\parskip}{0pt}}

% Compact title
\makeatletter
\renewcommand{\@maketitle}{%
  \begin{center}%
    \let \footnote \thanks
    {\Large\bfseries \@title \par}%
    {\small \@author \par}%
    {\small \@date}%
  \end{center}%
  \par\vspace{0.5em}}
\makeatother

\title{$title$}
\author{$author$}
\date{$date$}

\begin{document}

$if(title)$
\maketitle
$endif$

$body$

$if(references)$
\section*{References}
$references$
$endif$

\end{document}
